Title: Requires certain owners of multiple dwellings in N.Y. city to designate a secure space for packages to be delivered to
Summary: Requires owners of multiple dwellings with fifty or more units in cities with a population of one million or more to designate a secure, locked, monitored space, accessible only to staff, residents, or delivery people, for packages to be delivered to.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the multiple dwelling law, in relation to requiring certain owners of multiple dwellings in cities with a population of one million or more to designate a secure space for packages to be delivered to
